string.key: %@ needs to be in your Applications folder for best experience. Move it now?

translations.string: %@ needs to be in your Applications folder for best experience. Move it now?

string.key: All fans automatically return to Auto mode when the app quits, restarts, or crashes \u2014 a watchdog process enforces this.

translations.string: All fans automatically return to Auto mode when the app quits, restarts, or crashes \u2014 a watchdog process enforces this.

string.key: Background helper, launch behavior, and display preferences

translations.string: Background helper, launch behavior, and display preferences

string.key: By using MacFansControl you acknowledge that you accept full responsibility for any consequences resulting from adjusting fan speeds on your Mac.

translations.string: By using MacFansControl you acknowledge that you accept full responsibility for any consequences resulting from adjusting fan speeds on your Mac.

string.key: Check the update feed in the background on a regular interval.

translations.string: Check the update feed in the background on a regular interval.

string.key: Choose what the menu bar title shows and in what order

translations.string: Choose what the menu bar title shows and in what order

string.key: Display a Dock icon in addition to the menu bar. Takes effect immediately.

translations.string: Display a Dock icon in addition to the menu bar. Takes effect immediately.

string.key: Display temperatures in Celsius or Fahrenheit.

translations.string: Display temperatures in Celsius or Fahrenheit.

string.key: Download updates silently and prompt when ready to install.

translations.string: Download updates silently and prompt when ready to install.

string.key: Fan changes will prompt for your password every few minutes. Install the background helper from the General tab to authorize once and never see the prompt again.

translations.string: Fan changes will prompt for your password every few minutes. Install the background helper from the General tab to authorize once and never see the prompt again.

string.key: Fan changes will prompt for your password every few minutes. Install the helper to authorize once and never see the prompt again.

translations.string: Fan changes will prompt for your password every few minutes. Install the helper to authorize once and never see the prompt again.

string.key: Fan control works without password prompts. The privileged helper authorizes SMC writes on your behalf.

translations.string: Fan control works without password prompts. The privileged helper authorizes SMC writes on your behalf.

string.key: Fan settings are automatically re-applied after your Mac wakes from sleep to prevent stale states.

translations.string: Fan settings are automatically re-applied after your Mac wakes from sleep to prevent stale states.

string.key: Fan speed sliders are bounded by the hardware-reported minimum and maximum RPM values. You cannot set a fan below or above what the SMC allows.

translations.string: Fan speed sliders are bounded by the hardware-reported minimum and maximum RPM values. You cannot set a fan below or above what the SMC allows.

string.key: Live temperature readout across all subsystems

translations.string: Live temperature readout across all subsystems

string.key: Low temp must be less than high temp

translations.string: Low temp must be less than high temp

string.key: MacFansControl is open source. Star the repository, file issues, and follow development.

translations.string: MacFansControl is open source. Star the repository, file issues, and follow development.

string.key: Managed in macOS System Settings. Select your preferred language for MacFansControl in Language & Region.

translations.string: Managed in macOS System Settings. Select your preferred language for MacFansControl in Language & Region.

string.key: Manually overriding fan speeds can prevent your Mac from cooling properly. Sustained high temperatures may damage the CPU, GPU, SSD, or battery.

translations.string: Manually overriding fan speeds can prevent your Mac from cooling properly. Sustained high temperatures may damage the CPU, GPU, SSD, or battery.

string.key: No fans detected on this hardware.

translations.string: No fans detected on this hardware.

string.key: No favorites yet. Add sensors from the Sensors tab.

translations.string: No favorites yet. Add sensors from the Sensors tab.

string.key: No presets yet. Save your current fan configuration to get started.

translations.string: No presets yet. Save your current fan configuration to get started.

string.key: Only change fan settings if you understand your Mac's thermal requirements. If in doubt, leave fans in Auto mode.

translations.string: Only change fan settings if you understand your Mac's thermal requirements. If in doubt, leave fans in Auto mode.

string.key: Open MacFansControl automatically when you sign in.

translations.string: Open MacFansControl automatically when you sign in.

string.key: Open macOS Language and Region settings for MacFansControl

translations.string: Open macOS Language and Region settings for MacFansControl

string.key: Opens System Settings where you can change the app language

translations.string: Opens System Settings where you can change the app language

string.key: Please read before using fan control

translations.string: Please read before using fan control

string.key: Saved fan configurations you can apply with one click

translations.string: Saved fan configurations you can apply with one click

string.key: Setting fans too low under heavy load can cause thermal throttling, unexpected shutdowns, or permanent hardware damage.

translations.string: Setting fans too low under heavy load can cause thermal throttling, unexpected shutdowns, or permanent hardware damage.

string.key: Shows a hand-picked subset of favorites in the order below. Toggle rows to add or remove.

translations.string: Shows a hand-picked subset of favorites in the order below. Toggle rows to add or remove.

string.key: Shows a single metric — CPU average. Matches v1.0 behavior.

translations.string: Shows a single metric — CPU average. Matches v1.0 behavior.

string.key: Shows every favorite, separated by '·'. Hidden and unavailable favorites are filtered out.

translations.string: Shows every favorite, separated by '·'. Hidden and unavailable favorites are filtered out.

THIS SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND. THE AUTHORS AND CONTRIBUTORS ARE NOT LIABLE FOR ANY DIRECT, INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES — INCLUDING DATA LOSS, HARDWARE DAMAGE, PROFIT LOSS, OR ANY OTHER LOSSES — ARISING FROM THE USE OR MISUSE OF THIS PROGRAM.

string.key: Toggle temperature unit between Celsius and Fahrenheit

translations.string: Toggle temperature unit between Celsius and Fahrenheit

string.key: drag to reorder · affects menu bar title

translations.string: drag to reorder · affects menu bar title

string.key: exactly what the menu bar renders

translations.string: exactly what the menu bar renders

string.key: use this software at your own risk

translations.string: use this software at your own risk

string.key: what we do to protect you

translations.string: what we do to protect you
